TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Cangpingtu = Muuxul ma msemun ka karac Taiwan hini, malu pkuudus stliyus cangpingtu, kika idas sepac dehuk idas mngari ka ali pkrana mnarux nii, ani si seung naq niqal mangal kesun mnarux Canpingtu nii ka knkingal kawas, niqal mangal mnarux Cangpingtu nii ka misan duri, suango hari peni. Laqi daha rabu ruun hari mnarux cangpingtu nii, rahur mtliyus kesun Cangpingtu nii, knkingal klegan sknaxan na kkkingal klegan dungal,hmrinas hari maxal sngari kana. oda pnreeru Mbeyax riyung rmeeru ka Cangpingtu nii, pkdalax eluw iraq ma lhebun "quti-quwaq ma qsiyaq ma uuqun pnreeru"ma eluw hengak " mseyaq ma tbsengun" pnreeru, kika mnoda tmelung nalaq qraqil hei ma hulas ma mering daka duruq ruun duri. Knrexan knnarux na baga ma papak daha quwaq. Mttilux ma mscubu nalaq ka hei, tkriyak hema ma quwaq truma, niqal ka ruwane hei rupun ma pdahung quwaq ma qapan baga daha qapan papak, ado knteetu msnalaq ka quwaq truma kii uka brahan mekan. Pocensing Yensiyayen Asi lux mttilux ka hei, pberih ma msnalaq niqal kuweyang ka yensiyapu ma hlulas. Knnarux nii ge biciq ka dndilan na mnarux ma uka hari pinghwacen, dehuk hari rima ma mpitu ali de mthedu naq ka sseddiq di, ango bale seediq mangal pinhwacen peni. Dndilan na Uka hari dndilan na mnarux, kika wujingnawmoyen nawyen ma asi texan uka beyax " mntena siyawemapi " ini msderux mkkesa,mnarux mrunge ma wada dndilan singhuwekongren kii mgedang di. Hmuwa pdkarun Mdrumuc trima baga, pddulan wesensikuwan ta nanaq. Ini psuupu qyqeya uuqun ma suupu mekan ka ddamac " naicuwe, naiping taku..." Ptnai ka mekan ddamac, knbaka naq pstarin ma knbaka naq tnqian, so nii maha pkbeyax hari hei. Ali pnreeru, ini osa myeeyux hbaro sseediq ma ini sbhuran niqan upu kanna sseediq. Sndhriqan ma snbhuran ka nniqan daha ka sapah paysan. Sbrinah niqal uwesen ka seediq mptelung ma mpqlahang rabu. Dehuk sapah ka tama bubu de, kntaani trima baga rnyuxan lukus de "rmabang malu ka tnrima" kii malu tmelung rabu di.
S.PHON: = ¶aŇčpiŇčtu = muuxul ma ms…ômun ka ka…ĺa ¶ taiwan ńßini, malu pkuudus stlijus ¶aŇčpiŇčtu, kika idas s…ôpa ¶ d…ôńßuk idas mŇča…ĺi ka ali pk…ĺana mna…ĺux nii, ani si s…ôuŇč naq niqal maŇčal k…ôsun mna…ĺux ¶anpiŇčtu nii ka knkiŇčal kawas, niqal maŇčal mna…ĺux ¶aŇčpiŇčtu nii ka misan du…ĺi, suaŇčo ńßa…ĺi p…ôni. laqi dańßa …ĺabu …ĺuun ńßa…ĺi mna…ĺux ¶aŇčpiŇčtu nii, …ĺańßu…ĺ mtlijus k…ôsun ¶aŇčpiŇčtu nii, knkiŇčal kl…ôgan sknaxan na kkkiŇčal kl…ôgan duŇčal,ńßm…ĺinas ńßa…ĺi maxal sŇča…ĺi kana. oda pn…ĺ…ô…ô…ĺu mb…ôax …ĺijuŇč …ĺm…ô…ô…ĺu ka ¶aŇčpiŇčtu nii, pkdalax …ôluw i…ĺaq ma lńß…ôbun "quti-quwaq ma qsijaq ma uuqun pn…ĺ…ô…ô…ĺu"ma …ôluw ńß…ôŇčak " ms…ôaq ma tbs…ôŇčun" pn…ĺ…ô…ô…ĺu, kika mnoda tm…ôluŇč nalaq q…ĺaqil ńß…ôi ma ńßulas ma m…ô…ĺiŇč daka du…ĺuq …ĺuun du…ĺi. kn…ĺ…ôxan knna…ĺux na baga ma papak dańßa quwaq. mttilux ma ms ¶ubu nalaq ka ńß…ôi, tk…ĺijak ńß…ôma ma quwaq t…ĺuma, niqal ka …ĺuwan…ô ńß…ôi …ĺupun ma pdańßuŇč quwaq ma qapan baga dańßa qapan papak, ado knt…ô…ôtu msnalaq ka quwaq t…ĺuma kii uka b…ĺańßan m…ôkan. po ¶…ônsiŇč j…ônsijaj…ôn asi lux mttilux ka ńß…ôi, pb…ô…ĺińß ma msnalaq niqal kuw…ôaŇč ka j…ônsijapu ma ńßlulas. knna…ĺux nii g…ô bi ¶iq ka dndilan na mna…ĺux ma uka ńßa…ĺi piŇčńßwa ¶…ôn, d…ôńßuk ńßa…ĺi …ĺima ma mpitu ali d…ô mtńß…ôdu naq ka ss…ôddiq di, aŇčo bal…ô s…ô…ôdiq maŇčal pinńßwa ¶…ôn p…ôni. dndilan na uka ńßa…ĺi dndilan na mna…ĺux, kika wu…üiŇčnawmoj…ôn nawj…ôn ma asi t…ôxan uka b…ôax " mnt…ôna sijaw…ômapi " ini msd…ô…ĺux mkk…ôsa,mna…ĺux m…ĺuŇč…ô ma wada dndilan siŇčńßuw…ôkoŇč…ĺ…ôn kii mg…ôdaŇč di. ńßmuwa pdka…ĺun md…ĺumu ¶ t…ĺima baga, pddulan w…ôs…ônsikuwan ta nanaq. ini psuupu qjq…ôa uuqun ma suupu m…ôkan ka ddama ¶ " nai ¶uw…ô, naipiŇč taku..." ptnai ka m…ôkan ddama ¶, knbaka naq psta…ĺin ma knbaka naq tnqian, so nii mańßa pkb…ôax ńßa…ĺi ńß…ôi. ali pn…ĺ…ô…ô…ĺu, ini osa mj…ô…ôux ńßba…ĺo ss…ô…ôdiq ma ini sbńßu…ĺan niqan upu kanna ss…ô…ôdiq. sndńß…ĺiqan ma snbńßu…ĺan ka nniqan dańßa ka sapańß pajsan. sb…ĺinańß niqal uw…ôs…ôn ka s…ô…ôdiq mpt…ôluŇč ma mpqlańßaŇč …ĺabu. d…ôńßuk sapańß ka tama bubu d…ô, kntaani t…ĺima baga …ĺnjuxan lukus d…ô "…ĺmabaŇč malu ka tn…ĺima" kii malu tm…ôluŇč …ĺabu di.
S.FORM: = Cangpingtu = Muuxul ma msemun ka karac Taiwan hini, malu pkuudus stliyus cangpingtu, kika idas sepac dehuk idas mngari ka ali pkrana mnarux nii, ani si seung naq niqal mangal kesun mnarux Canpingtu nii ka knkingal kawas, niqal mangal mnarux Cangpingtu nii ka misan duri, suango hari peni. Laqi daha rabu ruun hari mnarux cangpingtu nii, rahur mtliyus kesun Cangpingtu nii, knkingal klegan sknaxan na kkkingal klegan dungal,hmrinas hari maxal sngari kana. oda pnreeru Mbeyax riyung rmeeru ka Cangpingtu nii, pkdalax eluw iraq ma lhebun "quti-quwaq ma qsiyaq ma uuqun pnreeru"ma eluw hengak " mseyaq ma tbsengun" pnreeru, kika mnoda tmelung nalaq qraqil hei ma hulas ma mering daka duruq ruun duri. Knrexan knnarux na baga ma papak daha quwaq. Mttilux ma mscubu nalaq ka hei, tkriyak hema ma quwaq truma, niqal ka ruwane hei rupun ma pdahung quwaq ma qapan baga daha qapan papak, ado knteetu msnalaq ka quwaq truma kii uka brahan mekan. Pocensing Yensiyayen Asi lux mttilux ka hei, pberih ma msnalaq niqal kuweyang ka yensiyapu ma hlulas. Knnarux nii ge biciq ka dndilan na mnarux ma uka hari pinghwacen, dehuk hari rima ma mpitu ali de mthedu naq ka sseddiq di, ango bale seediq mangal pinhwacen peni. Dndilan na Uka hari dndilan na mnarux, kika wujingnawmoyen nawyen ma asi texan uka beyax " mntena siyawemapi " ini msderux mkkesa,mnarux mrunge ma wada dndilan singhuwekongren kii mgedang di. Hmuwa pdkarun Mdrumuc trima baga, pddulan wesensikuwan ta nanaq. Ini psuupu qyqeya uuqun ma suupu mekan ka ddamac " naicuwe, naiping taku..." Ptnai ka mekan ddamac, knbaka naq pstarin ma knbaka naq tnqian, so nii maha pkbeyax hari hei. Ali pnreeru, ini osa myeeyux hbaro sseediq ma ini sbhuran niqan upu kanna sseediq. Sndhriqan ma snbhuran ka nniqan daha ka sapah paysan. Sbrinah niqal uwesen ka seediq mptelung ma mpqlahang rabu. Dehuk sapah ka tama bubu de, kntaani trima baga rnyuxan lukus de "rmabang malu ka tnrima" kii malu tmelung rabu di.
S.PHON: = ¶aŇčpiŇčtu = muuxul ma ms…ômun ka ka…ĺa ¶ taiwan ńßini, malu pkuudus stlijus ¶aŇčpiŇčtu, kika idas s…ôpa ¶ d…ôńßuk idas mŇča…ĺi ka ali pk…ĺana mna…ĺux nii, ani si s…ôuŇč naq niqal maŇčal k…ôsun mna…ĺux ¶anpiŇčtu nii ka knkiŇčal kawas, niqal maŇčal mna…ĺux ¶aŇčpiŇčtu nii ka misan du…ĺi, suaŇčo ńßa…ĺi p…ôni. laqi dańßa …ĺabu …ĺuun ńßa…ĺi mna…ĺux ¶aŇčpiŇčtu nii, …ĺańßu…ĺ mtlijus k…ôsun ¶aŇčpiŇčtu nii, knkiŇčal kl…ôgan sknaxan na kkkiŇčal kl…ôgan duŇčal,ńßm…ĺinas ńßa…ĺi maxal sŇča…ĺi kana. oda pn…ĺ…ô…ô…ĺu mb…ôax …ĺijuŇč …ĺm…ô…ô…ĺu ka ¶aŇčpiŇčtu nii, pkdalax …ôluw i…ĺaq ma lńß…ôbun "quti-quwaq ma qsijaq ma uuqun pn…ĺ…ô…ô…ĺu"ma …ôluw ńß…ôŇčak " ms…ôaq ma tbs…ôŇčun" pn…ĺ…ô…ô…ĺu, kika mnoda tm…ôluŇč nalaq q…ĺaqil ńß…ôi ma ńßulas ma m…ô…ĺiŇč daka du…ĺuq …ĺuun du…ĺi. kn…ĺ…ôxan knna…ĺux na baga ma papak dańßa quwaq. mttilux ma ms ¶ubu nalaq ka ńß…ôi, tk…ĺijak ńß…ôma ma quwaq t…ĺuma, niqal ka …ĺuwan…ô ńß…ôi …ĺupun ma pdańßuŇč quwaq ma qapan baga dańßa qapan papak, ado knt…ô…ôtu msnalaq ka quwaq t…ĺuma kii uka b…ĺańßan m…ôkan. po ¶…ônsiŇč j…ônsijaj…ôn asi lux mttilux ka ńß…ôi, pb…ô…ĺińß ma msnalaq niqal kuw…ôaŇč ka j…ônsijapu ma ńßlulas. knna…ĺux nii g…ô bi ¶iq ka dndilan na mna…ĺux ma uka ńßa…ĺi piŇčńßwa ¶…ôn, d…ôńßuk ńßa…ĺi …ĺima ma mpitu ali d…ô mtńß…ôdu naq ka ss…ôddiq di, aŇčo bal…ô s…ô…ôdiq maŇčal pinńßwa ¶…ôn p…ôni. dndilan na uka ńßa…ĺi dndilan na mna…ĺux, kika wu…üiŇčnawmoj…ôn nawj…ôn ma asi t…ôxan uka b…ôax " mnt…ôna sijaw…ômapi " ini msd…ô…ĺux mkk…ôsa,mna…ĺux m…ĺuŇč…ô ma wada dndilan siŇčńßuw…ôkoŇč…ĺ…ôn kii mg…ôdaŇč di. ńßmuwa pdka…ĺun md…ĺumu ¶ t…ĺima baga, pddulan w…ôs…ônsikuwan ta nanaq. ini psuupu qjq…ôa uuqun ma suupu m…ôkan ka ddama ¶ " nai ¶uw…ô, naipiŇč taku..." ptnai ka m…ôkan ddama ¶, knbaka naq psta…ĺin ma knbaka naq tnqian, so nii mańßa pkb…ôax ńßa…ĺi ńß…ôi. ali pn…ĺ…ô…ô…ĺu, ini osa mj…ô…ôux ńßba…ĺo ss…ô…ôdiq ma ini sbńßu…ĺan niqan upu kanna ss…ô…ôdiq. sndńß…ĺiqan ma snbńßu…ĺan ka nniqan dańßa ka sapańß pajsan. sb…ĺinańß niqal uw…ôs…ôn ka s…ô…ôdiq mpt…ôluŇč ma mpqlańßaŇč …ĺabu. d…ôńßuk sapańß ka tama bubu d…ô, kntaani t…ĺima baga …ĺnjuxan lukus d…ô "…ĺmabaŇč malu ka tn…ĺima" kii malu tm…ôluŇč …ĺabu di.
